description: As a machine learning engineer, you need to preprocess a 4-band Landsat multispectral image for a land cover classification model. The model requires 8-bit inputs with a compressed dynamic range. Using the source 16-bit GeoTIFF at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif (containing SWIR1, NIR, Red, Green bands), create at least two log-transformed virtual bands and at least one rescaled band that maps the log-transformed values to a 0-255 byte range. Save the enhanced product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/ml_normalized.dim and export the final product as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/ml_normalized_output.tif.
